glossary.definition: Splitting code into smaller chunks that can be loaded on demand.
Caching the results of expensive function calls to avoid recomputation.
Rendering only visible items in long lists for performance.
A React component that catches JavaScript errors in child components.
A pattern where components work together to share implicit state.
A technique for sharing code between components using a prop whose value is a function.
A function that takes a component and returns a new component with enhanced functionality.
